bodies:
Je pols verdient beter dan plastic namaak.
Kies voor authentieke stenen, handgemaakt in Nederland.
Tijdloos. Stoer. Betekenisvol.

👉 Kies jouw Stoney armband vandaag.

Waarom elk jaar vervangen…
Als je ook één keer goed kunt kiezen.
100% echte stenen. Sterk elastiek. Lifetime repair.

🖤 Investeer in iets echts.

Namaak breekt.
Stoney blijft.
Authentiek, handgemaakt en tijdloos stijlvol.

✅ Kies kwaliteit. Kies Stoney.

Je stijl zegt wie je bent.
Echte stenen vertellen een verhaal.
Draag geen massa, draag karakter.

Stoney. Crafted to last.

Een Stoney armband is geen accessoire.
Het is een statement.
Voor mannen die weten wat ze dragen.

🔥 Ontdek de kracht van echte stenen.

images.description: The image has a white background and is divided into two vertical columns by a thin black line, with large black serif text at the top reading "Your Wrist Deserves Better. This Is It." The left column is headed "Other bracelets" and shows a photograph of a beaded bracelet with small dark matte black beads and brown rectangular beads at the center, accompanied by three bullet points marked with red X icons reading "Synthetic or fake stones," "Weak elastic and poor durability," and "No character, no craftsmanship." The right column displays the text "STONEY bracelets" and shows a photograph of a beaded bracelet composed of blue and grey rounded stones with a small square metallic charm engraved with the letters "SB," accompanied by three bullet points marked with green checkmark icons reading "100% natural gemstones, rich in meaning," "Strong elastic + lifetime repair service," and "Handmade, thoughtfully packaged." At the bottom center is a black rounded-rectangle button with white text reading "CHOOSE REAL STONE."

The image has a white background and is divided into two columns by a vertical black line, comparing two beaded bracelets side by side. The left column is labeled "Other bracelets" and shows a bracelet with small matte black beads and a few rectangular brown/tiger-eye-toned beads at its center, accompanied by three red X icons next to the text "Synthetic or fake stones," "Weak elastic and poor durability," and "No character, no craftsmanship." The right column displays the text "STONEY bracelets" above a bracelet composed of larger blue and grey speckled beads with a single square metal charm engraved with the letters "SB," accompanied by three green checkmark icons next to the text "100% natural gemstones, rich in meaning," "Strong elastic + lifetime repair service," and "Handmade, thoughtfully packaged." At the top is large text reading "Your Wrist Deserves Better. This Is It.," a black button at the bottom reads "CHOOSE REAL STONE," and below that is a rating line reading "4.8 out of 5 stars" with four and a half filled star icons and "1,000+ reviews."
